qualifying_remote_run.description: Only a succeeding GitHub Actions run of Verify Living Constitution that executes the full pipeline may promote tip-state to verified.
promotion_requires: artifact_commit_hash equals GITHUB_SHA for that run

ci_provenance.status may be set to verified only after human updates MASTER_PROJECT_INVENTORY.json and verification/ci-remote-evidence/record.json to match that run (no unsafe CI writeback to default branch)

docs_only_commits.rule: Commits that touch no protected_surface_paths may leave historical remote evidence intact; tip_state_truth must still not be tip_verified until HEAD equals last_remote_qualifying_commit after a new qualifying run updates the anchor.
docs_only_commits.tip_claim: tip_verified requires HEAD == last_verified_commit == record artifact_commit_hash with status verified on a frozen verification target (PASS 7: not on a mutable symbolic branch tip)

escalation_hints.protected_surface_drift_without_fresh_re: tip_pending with escalation_state at least review_required when protected surfaces changed since last_remote_qualifying_commit
escalation_hints.repeated_qualifying_failure: escalation to blocked per review-escalation-policy scheduled streak
